name: @forwardimpact/librag
description: Consolidated retrieval CLIs — build the knowledge indexes, then query them by meaning or relationship.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Installing the knowledge stack and meeting six separately-named CLIs for what is really two operations: build the indexes, then query them.
jobs.bigHire: run the whole retrieval pipeline from two binaries with one subcommand per operation.
jobs.littleHire: process resources into indexes, then search, query, or list subjects over them.
jobs.competesWith: learning six binary names; wiring three write CLIs and three read CLIs by hand; skipping retrieval entirely
